title: cerasus × yuyamae
intro: Cerasus × yuyamae, also known as the cherry plum, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the Japanese apricot (Prunus mume) and the Japanese cherry (Prunus serrulata). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cerasus × yuyamae include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant effects. It is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
